name: use-sticky-offset
title: useStickyOffset
description: Coordinates a stack of sticky page regions (gov banner, header, site alert) so they stack instead of overlapping — each is pinned below the cumulative height of the sticky regions before it in the document.
useWhen: Making the gov banner, header, or site alert sticky, alone or stacked
avoidWhen: A single always-sticky element with no other sticky regions above it (plain position: sticky is enough)
